---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Apply Workspace
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-line description of the feature.

## Problem it solves

What friction, missing capability, or user need does this address?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] What does "done" look like for this feature?

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, related issues, or links.
